author: okezue
name: Non-record: Confidence-Adaptive N-gram Boost on PR #2018 stack, val_bpb=1.05874 (seed 42)
blurb: Two-line novel addition to the strict token-only n-gram tilt of PR #2018: scale the per-position boost beta by (1 - q_hint)^gamma, where q_hint is the prefix-only NN distribution at the scored position evaluated on the hinted token. The closed-form Z preserves normalization, so all four legal-TTT conditions are satisfied. ADAPTIVE_BOOST_GAMMA=1 yields a small but consistent improvement over the gamma=0 baseline reproduction.
novelty_summary: Confidence-adaptive boost: beta_t = TOKEN_BOOST * (1 - q_hint_t)^gamma where q_hint_t is the prefix-only NN distribution evaluated on the hinted token. Down-weights the n-gram tilt when NN already agrees, up-weights when NN disagrees.
